--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Tabaxi — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Tabaxi — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Tabaxi — Bardic Musician HP: 45/67
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 21 damage. Tabaxi — Bardic Musician HP: 24/67
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Tabaxi — Bardic Musician HP: 4/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Tabaxi — Bardic Musician --- HP: 4/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (4/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Tabaxi — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Tabaxi — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).

→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Tabaxi — Bardic Musician HP: -13/67
